name: Shaadi Dating (Unofficial Fans Group)
description: An unofficial fans group around the Shaadi matchmaking brand with roughly 14,800 members (July 2026), used for dating chat across India, Indonesia, UAE, Malaysia, Thailand and nearby regions.
cons: English is not the only chat language
seoDescription: Unofficial South/Southeast Asia dating community. Verified real and active July 2026 — subscribers, pros & cons and how to join.
